steps.title: Compare the two outputs
steps.content:
The function has the same output at $x=0$ and $x=8$:
$$
f(0)=6\quad\text{and}\quad f(8)=6
$$
For a linear function, equal outputs at two different inputs mean the slope is $0$.

steps.title: Choose the constant function
steps.content: A linear function with slope $0$ is constant. Since both given outputs are $6$, the function is $$ f(x)=6 $$ The answer is C.
